settings.title: Plugins
settings.trustWarning: Plugins run inside the app with the same access as the app itself. Install only plugins you trust.
settings.empty: No plugins installed. A plugin is a folder with a manifest.json and a main.js.
settings.uninstallConfirm: Uninstall {{name}}? Its files are removed; its stored data is kept.

permission.reading-data: Read and write reading data: books, highlights, notes, vocabulary
permission.dictionary: Use the built-in dictionary (runs on your AI model)
permission.llm: Make AI requests with your configured model

settings.placementHint: Pinned actions show as buttons; everything else stays in the overflow menu and the command palette.
settings.pinLimit: Up to {{count}} pinned — unpin one first.
settings.marketplaceHint: Community plugins are submitted by pull request to
